description: Extract structured fields from KYC identity and address proof documents

kycDocuments.description: List of KYC documents present in the given image/page. If there are multiple cards (like PAN, Aadhaar, Driving License) in the same image, identify and extract each one as a separate object.

documentType.description: Type of identity document. Identify from layout and labels: PAN has a 10-char alphanumeric code, Aadhaar has a 12-digit number, Passport has a booklet format with MRZ lines.

fullName.description: Full name of the document holder as printed on the document, found under 'Name' or below the photo on the card.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth as printed on the document under 'DOB' or 'Date of Birth'. Format as stated on the document.

documentNumber.description: Primary identifier on the document: 10-char PAN number, 12-digit Aadhaar number, Passport number starting with a letter, or Driving License number.

gender.description: Gender of the document holder as stated on the document under 'Sex' or 'Gender'.

address.description: Residential address printed on the document (mainly on Aadhaar or Voter ID), including house number, street, city, state, and PIN.

expiryDate.description: Document validity expiry date found under 'Valid Till' or 'Expiry Date'. Applicable for Passport and Driving License. Null for PAN and Aadhaar.

issueDate.description: Date the document was issued by the authority, found under 'Date of Issue'. Applicable mainly for Passport and Driving License.
